headline: Trump рҹҘ“рҹ”« Dodges Hilton Hotel HIT SQUAD рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ« вҖ“ Secret Service SLAYS Again! рҹҳӨрҹӣЎпёҸ
text:
ORANGE MAN BADASS рҹҘ“рҹ‘‘ Trumpie Bear рҹҚҠрҹҗ» is DROPPING BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹ“ў: 'No gig more DANGEROUS рҹҳұрҹ”Ҙ than POTUS life!' Just HOURS after ANOTHER close call at DC's White House Correspondents' Dinner рҹҘӮрҹҸЁ вҖ“ that's THREE MAJOR SECURITY DRAMA QUEENS рҹ’…рҹҡЁ in THREE YEARS, bby! First, Butler PA sniper GRAZED his ear рҹ©ёрҹ‘Ӯ like a bad haircut in summer '24, then 64 days later GOLF COURSE GUNMAN рҹҳӨвӣі on Mar-a-Lago vibes, and NOW Hilton Hotel SHOOTOUT рҹ’Ҙрҹ”« outside the BALLROOM BASH рҹҺү!

Suspect Cole Tomas Allen рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹ’»рҹ”Ә, 31yo edgelord with SHOTGUN рҹҚҶрҹ’Ё, HANDGUN рҹ”«, and KNIFE PARTY рҹ—ЎпёҸрҹ—ЎпёҸ, CHARGES thru Secret Service checkpoint рҹҡ«рҹӣЎпёҸ like a budget Jason Voorhees! CCTV TEA рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“№ shows him BLASTING AWAY рҹҳ©рҹ’Ҙ, trading BULLETS with agents before getting SMOKED рҹҘңрҹҡ”. Wolf Blitzer рҹҗәрҹ“ә on CNN SPILLS: 'VERY VERY SERIOUS weapon' вҖ“ dude FIRED MULTIPLE ROUNDS рҹҚҶрҹ”« near DC's ELITE journos, pols, and diplos! Trump posts SHIRTLESS CUFFED SIMP рҹҳҙрҹ–җпёҸ pic with SS DADDIES рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвңҲпёҸрҹӣЎпёҸ standing guard вҖ“ THICC security vibes! Acting AG Todd Blanche рҹ“ңрҹ”Ҙ says target was ADMIN OFFICIALS, 'LIKELY including DONNIE рҹ‘‘' вҖ“ hotel GUEST рҹҳҲ got past ONE WEAK DOOR DUDE рҹ‘ҖрҹҡӘ from SIX FEET, per BBC's Gary O'Donoghue рҹ“°рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§!

UK ex-ambassador Kim Darroch рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§рҹӨЁ ROASTS: 'Hotel guests could CRASH the party рҹҺүрҹҡӘ with BAD INTENTIONS рҹҳҲ вҖ“ just ONE checkpoint to BALLROOM!' Trump CLAPS BACK рҹ‘җ: 'Hilton ain't SECURE рҹҸЁрҹҡ«, need that NEW White House BALLROOM рҹҸ°рҹӣЎпёҸ вҖ“ DRONE-PROOF рҹӣ©пёҸрҹҡ«, BULLETPROOF GLASS рҹ’Һрҹ”№, litigation be DAMNED вҡ–пёҸрҹҳӨ!' Praises SS BRAVERY рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҘҮ for yanking him + JD VANCE рҹҡҖрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј offstage вҖ“ 'GREAT JOB, boys! рҹ’Әрҹ”Ҙ' Ex-FBI Jeff Kroeger рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё: 'SS DID THEIR THANG рҹӣЎпёҸ вҖ“ converged on Prez, BODY BARRIER рҹӨјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡ«!' Barry Donadio agrees: NO SHORTAGE of AGENTS рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡ” вҖ“ gunman NEVER HIT BALLROOM рҹҺүрҹҡ«!

POLITICAL VIOLENCE ORGY рҹ’ҘрҹҮәрҹҮё ramping UP рҹ“Ҳрҹҳұ: Capitol PD probed 8K+ THREATS in '23 (50% JUMP рҹҡҖ from '18)! Charlie Kirk рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹ”Ҙ GUNNED DOWN in Utah last year at TPUSA event рҹ“№рҹ’Җ вҖ“ viral AF! MN Rep Melissa Hortman + hubby MARK рҹҳўрҹ’” EXECUTED, Sen John Hoffman + Yvette SHOT UP рҹ©ёрҹ”« but SURVIVED! Nancy Pelosi's hubby PAUL рҹ”Ёрҹ’Ҙ HAMMERED skull-fracture in '22, Steve Scalise baseball SHOOTOUT вҡҫрҹ”« in '17, even REAGAN рҹ•¶пёҸрҹҘ“ punctured lung by Hinckley Jr back in '81! Trump studies ASSASSINATION HISTORY рҹ“ҡрҹ©ё like a boss: 'Big names like LINCOLN рҹҺ©рҹ”« get TARGETED вҖ“ hate to flex, but I'VE DONE A LOT рҹҘҮрҹҮәрҹҮё!'

Experts YEET wider perimeters for Trump rallies рҹҡ§рҹ“Ҹ, but SS proving UNTOUCHABLE рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҳӨ вҖ“ Orange Daddy SAFE AF despite AmericaвҖҷs POLI-RAGE FIESTA рҹҳЎрҹ’Ҙ! No bubble here, just Trump BULLETPROOF LEGEND status рҹҡҖрҹӣЎпёҸвҖјпёҸ
